CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SHACUAN SHARON SETO AKA SHARON SETO, DAVID SETO, GORDON LEE, RAISSI REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT, LLC, WINCHESTER PLAZA ON THE ROWE LLC, AND GREENLIGHT CAPITAL GROUP, LLC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled with twenty days to file an answer. The new allegations at 3:20-4:3 of the amended complaint allege the fraudulent misrepresentations with the requisite specificity and the defendants' scienter. Paragraph 5 of the amended complaint alleges that the defendants were agents/co-conspirators and those allegations support liability against each defendant.( Applied Equipment Corp. v. Litton Saudi Arabia Ltd. (1994) 7 Cal.4th 503, 510-511 ("Conspiracy is not a cause of action, but a legal doctrine that imposes liability on persons who, although not actually committing a tort themselves, share with the immediate tortfeasors a common plan or design in its perpetration'By participation in a civil conspiracy, a coconspirator effectively adopts as his or her own the torts of other coconspirators within the ambit of the conspiracy. In this way, a coconspirator incurs tort liability co-equal with the immediate tortfeasors.") ) The concealment cause of action by its very nature needs to be alleged with less particularity. Less particularity is required where the defendant must necessarily possess full information concerning the facts of the controversy. (Committee on Children's Television Inc, (1983) 35 Cal.3d 197, 217 (superseded by statute on other grounds). Order signed in open court. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Nov-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS SHACUAN SHARON SETO AKA SHARON SETO, DAVID SETO, GORDON LEE, RAISSI REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT, LLC, WINCHESTER PLAZA ON THE ROWE LLC and GREENLIGHT CAPITAL GROUP, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. The Demurrer is sustained for failure to state a claim as to the first, third, fourth and sixth causes of action with fifteen days leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege with the requisite specificity how and when the false representations were made, and how Defendants knew the representations were false. Plaintiff must also make factual allegations establishing that Defendants owed fiduciary duties to Plaintiff. The Demurrer is overruled as to the second and fifth causes of action for rescission as Defendants fail to make any argument to support their conclusory subject heading. Demurrer is also overruled for all causes of action on uncertainty grounds. (See Fenton v. Groveland Comm. Services Dist. (1982) 135 Cal.App.3d 797, 809 (A demurrer made on uncertainty grounds must distinctly specify exactly how or why the pleading is uncertain, and where such uncertainty appears by reference to page and line numbers in the complaint.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg
